name: beredskapsboka
description: Offline-first Norwegian Civil Defence field-support PWA with local missions, checklists, map/log workflow and privacy-safe exports.

scripts.build: npm run build:content && npm run build:app
scripts.start: mkdir -p .next/standalone/.next && rm -rf .next/standalone/public .next/standalone/.next/static && cp -R public .next/standalone/public && cp -R .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && cd .next/standalone && node server.js
scripts.e2e: npm run build && npm run e2e:prod:no-build
scripts.e2e:prod: npm run build && npm run e2e:prod:no-build
scripts.build:content: npm run import:obsidian && npm run compile:curated && npm run build:search && npm run sync:workplans && npm run validate:content
scripts.check:generated: git diff --cached --exit-code -- content/generated/source-documents.json content/generated/source-snapshot-metadata.json content/workplans/workplans.json && git diff --exit-code -- content/generated/source-documents.json content/generated/source-snapshot-metadata.json content/workplans/workplans.json
scripts.check:ci: npm run audit:ci && npm run check:workplans && npm run build:content && npm run check:generated && npm run validate:maps && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build:app && npm run e2e:prod:no-build && npm run perf:budget && npm run perf:lighthouse
